channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: How scammers use "scraped New York Times content" to trick security scanners — and exploit "free" Google Cloud links to flood your inbox
item.description: Researchers uncovered a global phishing network using Google Cloud redirects and copied news content across thousands of coordinated servers.

item.title: Xiaomi's new open source, agentic AI coding harness MiMo Code beats Claude Code at ultra-long, 200+ step tasks
item.description: Xiaomi's MiMo AI team has open-sourced MiMo Code V0.1.0, a terminal-native AI coding assistant that the Chinese electronics giant says outperforms Anthropic's Claude Code on key agentic coding benchmarks, especially on long-horizon, multi-step tasks (200+ steps) — at least, according to its own internal beta release and survey of 576 developers. It's also bundling limited-time free access to MiMo-V2.5, its multimodal flagship model with a million-token context window, requiring no registration to get started.The release was announced June 10, 2026 in a post on the social network X from the off...

item.title: How to watch Power Book III: Raising Kanan season 5 online — stream the final season from anywhere
item.description: The long-running story of Kanan Stark is coming to an end — here's how to watch Power Book III: Raising Kanan season 5.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Friday, June 12 (game #831)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Friday, June 12 (game #1097)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Friday, June 12 (game #1600)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: Researchers are developing textiles that can produce drinking water from the air
Elon Musk shares anti-immigrant posts before SpaceX IPO
item.description: Musk, SpaceX's CEO, promotes anti-immigrant views after a stabbing in the UK.

item.title: The Death of Robin Hood review: Hugh Jackman leads a bleak, brutal, and boring re-imagining of the outlaw
item.description: Hugh Jackman leads a bleak, brutal, and boring re-imagining of the outlaw legend in "The Death of Robin Hood." Review.

item.title: Quote of the day by Mark Zuckerberg: 'Metaverse isn't a thing a company builds. It's the next chapter of the internet overall' — a prediction that hit wide of the mark
item.description: The Meta CEO's pandemic-era predictions on the future of technology failed to materilaize

item.title: MSI’s special edition Titan 18HX gaming laptop is incredibly over the top — and I’m obsessed
item.description: You’d have to be a dragon fanatic, a maximalist, or a big MSI fan to love the special edition Titan 18HX, so it’s a good thing I’m all three

item.title: AI has finally reached The Rock and 'after taking a hard look at it,' he's got an 'extraordinary f-ing workout' and might be rethinking his Presidential aspirations
item.description: Dwayne (The Rock) Johnson finally found AI, and it's already given him a great workout and thoughts on a possible second (or is it third?) career.

item.title: ‘Hands Off Our NHS’: Anti-Palantir Protests Break Out in UK Over Deal With National Health Service
item.description: Crowding the gates of a major health care conference, protesters called for Palantir to be booted out of the UK’s National Health Service over privacy concerns and political grievances.

item.title: Overwatch's latest hero will throw a bike at your head
item.description: Shion arrives when Season 3 starts on June 16.
